displayProperties.description: Increased loot from public events on all destinations.

displayProperties.name: Cooling Baubles
displayProperties.description:
Collecting an Elemental pickup, collecting an Orb of Power, or destroying a Tangle reduces slightly more heat.

Elemental pickups include [Solar]Firesprites, [Void]Void Breaches, [Arc]Ionic Traces, [Stasis]Stasis Shards, and [Strand]Strand Tangles.

displayProperties.name: Virulent Strides
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Solstice Plate (Drained)
displayProperties.description: Memories of the City burn in your heart.

displayProperties.name: Sterling Arbor Projection
displayProperties.description: Equip this item to change your Ghost's projection.
